body: [{"ac":1,"text":"A DESIGN.md (or equivalent design-token source) for cli/internal/server/frontend documents the type scale, line-heights, and spacing scale, and components consume those tokens rather than ad-hoc values on the touched pages.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":2,"text":"Typography/spacing tokens are applied to at least the primary surfaces (nav shell + one list page + one detail page); no remaining hardcoded one-off font-size/line-height on those surfaces.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":3,"text":"Playwright captures before/after screenshots of the touched pages, attached under the attempt evidence dir.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":4,"text":"cd cli/internal/server/frontend \u0026\u0026 bun run test green; bun run build succeeds.","kind":"build-gate","verifiable":true},{"ac":5,"text":"lefthook run pre-commit passes","kind":"build-gate","verifiable":true}]
